repo.description: A PyTorch implementation of the Deep Audio-Visual Speech Recognition paper.

terms.context_snippet: The repository contains a PyTorch reproduction of the TM-CTC model from the [Deep Audio-Visual Speech Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/1809.02108) paper. We train three models - Audio-Only (AO), Video-Only (VO) and Audio-Visual (AV), on the [LRS2 dataset](http://www.robots.ox.…
